description: 商务蓝金 - 深蓝主色 + 金色点缀,权威克制的金融感,适合商业 / 投研 / 行业分析

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #0f1a33; line-height: 1.8; letter-spacing: 0.35px; word-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 20px 16px; background: #ffffff;
styles.h1: font-size: 23px; font-weight: 800; color: #0b2445; text-align: left; margin: 34px 0 20px; padding: 0 0 14px 0; border-bottom: 3px double #0b2445; letter-spacing: 0.4px; line-height: 1.4;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: #0b2445; margin: 40px 0 18px; padding: 2px 0 2px 16px; border-left: 4px solid #c9a74a; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.h3: font-size: 15.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #0b2445; margin: 28px 0 12px; padding: 0; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.p: margin: 16px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #1a233a; line-height: 1.85;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 18px 22px; background: #f4f6fb; border-left: 3px solid #c9a74a; color: #2a3552; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 2px; margin: 24px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(11,36,69,0.1); border: 1px solid #e0e5ee;
styles.code_inline: background: #eef2f8; color: #0b2445; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; border: 1px solid #d6dde9;
styles.code_block: background: #0b2445; color: #e7ecf5; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 24px 0; border: 1px solid #1a3360; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #c9a74a; font-weight: 900; font-size: 11px; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #c9a74a; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; min-width: 22px; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #c9a74a, transparent); margin: 40px 0;
styles.a: color: #1a4480; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,68,128,0.4);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 24px 0; font-size: 14px; border-top: 2px solid #0b2445; border-bottom: 2px solid #0b2445; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: #0b2445; color: #c9a74a; padding: 10px 8px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e6ebf3; color: #1a233a; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12.5px; color: #7a85a0; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.6px; font-style: italic;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #c9a74a; letter-spacing: 16px; font-size: 12px; margin: 38px 0; user-select: none;

highlights.hl_yellow: background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 58%, #ffe79a 58%); color: #0f1a33; padding: 0 5px; font-weight: 600;

list_style.label: A · 金边罗马
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; border: 1.5px solid #c9a74a; color: #c9a74a; font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1px; min-width: 26px; height: 22px; line-height: 20px; text-align: center; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 2px; font-family: 'Georgia','Times New Roman',serif;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; color: #c9a74a; font-size: 12px; margin-right: 12px; font-weight: 900;
